sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Back in the News: We Energies, Kohl’s Paid Zero Federal Taxes in 2025
feed.summary: A new study by the Institute for Taxation and Economic Policy (ITEP) reveals that 88 corporations, including Wisconsin-based WEC Energy Group (We Energies) and Kohl’s, paid zero federal taxes in 2025 despite significant profits. This increase in corporate tax avoidance is attributed to Trump administration tax cuts. The report highlights that these companies collectively avoided $22.1 billion in taxes based on the 21% statutory rate and received $4.7 billion in rebates, while the pre-2017 35% rate would have resulted in $41 billion more in taxes.

feed.title: How IBM Quantum is Enabling Healthcare and Biology Research
feed.summary: IBM Quantum has significantly advanced healthcare and biology research, as demonstrated by the Q4Bio Challenge where five of six Phase III finalists utilized IBM quantum hardware. The winning team, Algorithmiq, Cleveland Clinic, and IBM, received a $2 million prize for simulating key processes in cancer treatment using up to 100 qubits. This initiative, which began in 2023 with $40 million in funding, highlights the growing potential of hybrid quantum-classical computing to solve complex problems in drug discovery, genomics, and biomarker identification, pushing quantum computing from theoretical experiment to application-driven progress.

feed.title: Research Alert: CFRA Maintains Buy Opinion On Shares Of Lumentum Holdings Inc.
feed.summary: CFRA has maintained a Buy opinion on shares of Lumentum Holdings Inc. The article also briefly mentions Unity Software's fourth-quarter financial results, reporting a 35% revenue increase year-over-year to $609 million and a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share.

feed.title: Margin Expansion Makes Seagate Stock a Winner This Earnings Season, According to Analysts
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX) is projected to be a strong performer this earnings season, with analysts anticipating significant margin expansion driven by the adoption of its 40TB HAMR products and robust demand from AI data centers. The company's EPS is expected to grow 94.6% year-over-year for Q3 FY26, and its Mozaic 4+ platform positions it well to capitalize on the AI supercycle and increasing memory demand. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" rating for Seagate, with some raising price targets, despite a relative downside from current levels according to the consensus price target.

feed.title: Is Devon Energy (DVN) Pricing Look Attractive After Strong 1 Year Share Price Gain
feed.summary: Devon Energy (DVN) has shown strong share price performance over the past year with a 58.4% return, despite recent short-term declines. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is significantly undervalued by 80.0%, with an intrinsic value of $226.28 per share compared to its current price of $45.23. The article also presents "Narratives" with bull and bear cases, showing potential fair values ranging from $44.34 to $69.00 per share, indicating varying perspectives on its growth and risks.

feed.title: What's Going On With PayPal Stock Today?
feed.summary: PayPal (NASDAQ: PYPL) stock dropped significantly after the company scrapped its long-term outlook and reported weaker-than-expected performance, citing operational challenges and competitive pressures. Simultaneously, its Venmo platform is expanding its rewards program and merchant network, showing growth in transaction volume. Despite a bearish long-term technical trend, analysts have a mixed view with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $67.88.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials Christens The Mv. Larry Gravely
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials recently christened its new vessel, the mv. Larry Gravely, named after its marine operations coordinator who is retiring after a 47-year career. This new towboat, built by Diversified Marine, is the first brand-new vessel for Vulcan and features enhanced comforts aimed at making the crew feel at home. A sister ship is also under construction and expected to be completed in July.

feed.title: Albemarle Corp Stock (ALB) Moved Up by 12.74% on Apr 16: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Albemarle Corp (ALB) stock rose 12.74% on April 16, driven by a strong rebound in the lithium market, increased demand from EV and energy storage sectors, and positive analyst sentiment. Bullish "buy" ratings and raised price targets from Wall Street analysts, coupled with the company's successful debt management, contributed to investor confidence despite concerns about potential oversupply and valuation.

feed.title: J B Hunt Transport Services Inc Stock (JBHT) Moved Up by 7.30% on Apr 16: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) saw its stock rise by 7.30% due to a strong Q1 2026 earnings report that exceeded expectations and a positive outlook on the recovering freight market. Several analyst firms upgraded their price targets for JBHT, reflecting confidence in the company's growth, while management highlighted operational efficiencies and a commitment to shareholder returns. Despite the positive movement, J.B. Hunt's stock appears overvalued with a high P/E ratio, and the company faces risks such as ongoing margin compression and macroeconomic headwinds.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor Corp Stock (ON) Moved Up by 8.74% on Apr 16: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor Corp (ON) stock surged 8.74% on April 16, outperforming its sector, driven by a Bank of America "Buy" upgrade, increased call option activity, and the company's strategic focus on AI and Silicon Carbide technology. Despite a mixed recent earnings report, positive forward guidance for automotive and AI sectors, and an upcoming analyst day, are contributing to investor confidence. Technical indicators also suggest a buy signal, though some risks like high valuation and insider selling are noted.

feed.title: Quantum Stocks Are Booming — S&P Global Says 2026 'Is Triggering Change'
feed.summary: Quantum computing stocks are experiencing a significant rally, fueled by Nvidia's new AI toolset for quantum processors and a fresh S&P Global report. The report highlights that global quantum investment surpassed $55 billion in 2025, with market revenue projected to increase from $2.5 billion in 2025 to nearly $9 billion in 2026, signaling 2026 as a breakout year for the sector. Companies like Xanadu Quantum Technologies, Infleqtion Inc., and IonQ Inc. have seen substantial gains this week.

feed.title: West Virginia American Water Announces $550,000 Infrastructure Project in Fayetteville
feed.summary: West Virginia American Water is investing $550,000 in an infrastructure upgrade project on E. Maple Avenue in Fayetteville, replacing 1,020 feet of aging pipe with new 6-inch PVC main. This project, part of a larger $134 million statewide investment in 2026, aims to improve water service reliability and supports local economic health by generating jobs. The company, a subsidiary of American Water, plans to complete the work by the end of June, with final street restoration in the summer.

feed.title: Aging Fayetteville water line to be replaced in $550K summer project
feed.summary: West Virginia American Water is investing $550,000 to replace 1,020 feet of aging water pipe on E. Maple Avenue in Fayetteville, a project expected to be completed by the end of June 2026. This initiative is part of a larger $134 million statewide infrastructure upgrade plan for 2026 and aims to enhance system reliability and water quality for the community. During construction, customers may experience temporary service interruptions and traffic restrictions.

feed.title: 7 metro Atlanta Walmart stores to be remodeled in 2026
feed.summary: Walmart plans to remodel 13 stores in Georgia this year, with seven located in the metro Atlanta area. These upgrades will include enhanced store layouts, new technology, and services designed to streamline the shopping experience, such as free pharmacy deliveries for Walmart+ members. The company has invested nearly a billion dollars over the past five years to modernize its Georgia locations.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Gears up for 4-H Paper Clover Fundraiser, Adds Gift Component Through TSC Foundation
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company is launching its biannual spring Paper Clover fundraiser from April 17 to May 3, supporting 4-H youth scholarships nationwide. This year, the TSC Foundation is adding a bonus competition for local 4-H organizations during Demo Days on April 25, offering additional grants based on fundraising performance. The fundraiser, now in its 16th year, has raised over $26 million to strengthen educational programs and leadership skills for 4-H members.

feed.title: Ekterly reduces anxiety tied to HAE attacks, new study finds
feed.summary: A new study found that Ekterly (sebetralstat) effectively and quickly reduced anxiety associated with hereditary angioedema (HAE) swelling attacks compared to a placebo. The KONFIDENT Phase 3 trial data showed that Ekterly led to significantly greater and faster anxiety relief, especially in patients with moderate-to-extreme anxiety, with improvements in physical symptoms correlating with reduced emotional distress. Researchers highlighted the ongoing need to address anxiety comprehensively alongside physical symptoms to improve HAE patients' quality of life.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Gears up for 4-H Paper Clover Fundraiser, Adds Gift Component Through TSC Foundation
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company is launching its spring Paper Clover fundraiser from April 17 to May 3, to raise scholarships for 4-H youth. This year, the TSC Foundation is adding a bonus competition for 4-H organizations, offering additional grants based on their fundraising performance during Demo Days on April 27-28. The initiative, now in its 16th year, aims to strengthen educational programs for 4-H members and has collectively raised over $22 million for youth development.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment (NASDAQ:CZR) Price Target Raised to $30.00
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its price target for Caesars Entertainment (NASDAQ:CZR) from $23.00 to $30.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 9.15% from the stock's previous close. Other analysts have varying price targets and ratings, with the stock currently holding an average "Hold" rating and an average price target of $32.80.

feed.title: International Paper to acquire NORPAC for $360 million By Investing.com
feed.summary: International Paper (NYSE:IP) is set to acquire North Pacific Paper Company (NORPAC) from One Rock Capital Partners for $360 million, expanding its West Coast footprint. This acquisition adds production capacity for lightweight, high-performance recycled containerboard and is considered a strategic fit for International Paper's long-term value creation. The deal, which enhances their presence in the growing West Coast region, comes amidst other company developments including a new packaging facility investment and recent stock performance fluctuations.

feed.title: Semiconductor ETFs Surge As AI Boom Powers Nvidia-Led Rally
feed.summary: Semiconductor-focused ETFs are experiencing a significant rally, driven by accelerating AI infrastructure spending and strong demand across the chip value chain. The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH) has surged 20% in the last month and 25% year-to-date, significantly outperforming the broader market. The rally is fueled by strong performances from companies like Lam Research, Intel, Nvidia, and Marvell Technology, with specialized Nvidia-linked ETFs showing particularly high gains.

feed.title: Memphis company acquiring West Coast firm for $360M
feed.summary: Memphis-based International Paper is acquiring a West Coast firm for $360 million, adding a paper mill with 500 workers that produces 1 million tons annually. The acquisition was highlighted by the Memphis Business Journal.

feed.title: Why Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) Stock Popped on Thursday
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) stock surged by over 7% on Thursday following bullish commentary from a Wall Street analyst. Bernstein analyst Stacy Rasgon maintained a "market perform" rating but increased his price target to $265, citing AMD's potential in server and data center chips and its deal with Meta Platforms. Despite the analyst's hold rating, the overall sentiment on Wall Street for AMD remains highly bullish, with many analysts issuing buy ratings and a higher average price target, driven by the strong demand for AI technology.

feed.title: Lloyds Banking Group (NYSE: LYG) buys back 1M shares
feed.summary: Lloyds Banking Group (NYSE: LYG) announced the repurchase of 1,000,000 of its ordinary shares on April 16, 2026, through Goldman Sachs International. These shares were bought back at an average price of 103.9131 pence, ranging from 103.1200 to 105.0000 pence, as part of the company's existing share buyback program. Lloyds Banking Group intends to cancel all repurchased shares, which will reduce the total number of ordinary shares outstanding.

feed.title: Okta stock jumps as Raymond James upgrades
feed.summary: Okta shares surged over 6% after Raymond James upgraded the stock to "Outperform," citing improving growth fundamentals and opportunities related to artificial intelligence. The firm set a price target of $85, indicating a 26% upside, believing Okta's current valuation undervalues its potential for renewed growth and leveraging AI-driven demand for identity security. Analysts suggest Okta is transitioning to a recovery phase with potential revenue growth exceeding 10% by fiscal 2027.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics buys Texas Pacific Land (TPL) share at $419 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a ten-

feed.title: Domino's Pizza Inc (NASDAQ:DPZ) Short Interest Up 25.9% in March
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza Inc (NASDAQ:DPZ) experienced a significant increase in short interest during March, rising by 25.9% to 3,419,660 shares. This means 10.3% of the company's shares are now sold short, with a days-to-cover ratio of 3.2 days. Institutional investors, including Northwestern Mutual Wealth Management Co., Norges Bank, and Berkshire Hathaway Inc., have also made substantial adjustments to their stakes in the company.

feed.title: Small firms can get up to $5,000 from T-Mobile for adding phone lines
feed.summary: T-Mobile is offering small businesses incentives to add new phone lines, including a $100 activation credit for each new line when activating 15 or more, potentially reaching up to $5,000 for 50 lines. The company also announced a Small Business Momentum Workshop for selected businesses. This initiative highlights T-Mobile's SuperMobile plan, designed to provide reliable connectivity and unique features like satellite messaging for businesses operating in diverse environments, as demonstrated by customer examples like Sugar Plum Chocolates and Morrison's Outdoor Adventures.

feed.title: State Street IM Builds Dedicated Sector ETF Team
feed.summary: State Street Investment Management has established a dedicated global Sector ETF team of 18 specialists and strategists following the in-housing of distribution and marketing for 11 Select Sector SPDR ETFs. This move aims to strengthen the platform through expanded global distribution, modernized marketing, and enhanced research. The firm is observing strong interest in both passive Select Sector SPDR ETFs, which saw $6.5 billion in inflows, and newer Premium Income Sector ETFs, as well as alternative ETFs for diversified portfolios.

feed.title: Inuvo and FreeWheel Announce Integration to Advance IntentKey’s Programmatic Decisioning
feed.summary: Inuvo and FreeWheel have announced an integration to enhance programmatic media buying through Inuvo’s IntentKey AI. This collaboration embeds IntentKey’s AI-driven models of consumer intent directly into FreeWheel's Buyer Cloud bidding process, enabling advertisers to make real-time, impression-level decisions based on predicted interest and relevance. The integration aims to provide advertisers with greater control, flexibility, and performance in the programmatic advertising landscape by allowing custom execution and increased transparency.

feed.title: Microsoft edges up as new Fairweather data center goes online early
feed.summary: Microsoft shares rose after CEO Satya Nadella announced that the company's Fairweather data center in Wisconsin went online ahead of schedule. The news contributed to a multi-day rally for Microsoft stock, which was up nearly 2% in early afternoon trading.

feed.title: Walmart is remodeling 24 New York stores in 2026. Here’s what’s changing, and where
feed.summary: Walmart plans to remodel 24 New York stores in 2026, part of a larger national modernization effort to improve in-store and digital shopping experiences. The upgrades will include enhanced store layouts, technology, and services like faster delivery and a store-based navigation app. Walmart+ members will also receive free pharmacy delivery, and updated stores will feature new brands and interactive displays.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics buys Texas Pacific Land (TPL) share at $419
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a significant shareholder in Texas Pacific Land Corp (TPL), recently purchased a single share for $419. This transaction follows the death of board member Murray Stahl, who was also CEO and Chairman of Horizon Kinetics. Despite the stock trading at a high valuation (P/E of 60.79), analysts maintain an Overweight rating, citing opportunities in power generation and data centers, and highlight the company's strong gross profit margins and healthy balance sheet.

feed.title: Here's What to Expect From Jacobs Solutions' Next Earnings Report
feed.summary: Jacobs Solutions Inc. (J) is set to announce its fiscal second-quarter 2026 earnings, with analysts projecting a 14.7% rise in EPS to $1.64. The company has a history of surpassing Wall Street's EPS estimates, and its full-year EPS is expected to grow by 16.5% in fiscal 2026. Despite underperforming market indices, analysts hold a "Moderate Buy" rating for J, with a significant potential upside in its stock price.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) slides 3% as investors refocus on recent safety and cybersecurity overhangs
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) saw its stock slide 3% due to investor concerns over recent safety and cybersecurity issues. These concerns include a U.S. regulator's safety communication regarding stapler products used with da Vinci systems and a disclosed cybersecurity incident affecting the company's internal administrative systems. The drop reflects risk-off positioning and de-risking actions by investors amidst the company's premium valuation and upcoming earnings, with sources citing FDA and company disclosures.

feed.title: 4 Health Care Stocks With Whale Alerts In Today's Session
feed.summary: This article highlights unusual options activity, known as "whale alerts," for four health care stocks: UnitedHealth Group (UNH), Pfizer (PFE), Humana (HUM), and Novo Nordisk (NVO). It details specific call and put option trades with significant contract volumes and total trade prices, indicating potential shifts in sentiment for each company. This information can be useful for traders looking for big trading opportunities.

feed.title: Cummins Unveils RT-160 HE Tandem Drive Axle
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. introduced the Meritor RT-160 HE tandem drive axle at Truck World, designed for heavy linehaul applications to improve efficiency while maintaining capacity. This new axle features the Meritor Lube Management System, which reduces internal losses and lowers oil operating temperatures, leading to a 1% efficiency gain over its predecessor. The RT-160 HE is slated for production in the first quarter of 2027.

feed.title: Linde PLC (NASDAQ:LIN) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: Linde PLC (NASDAQ:LIN) experienced a significant 27.1% increase in short interest during March, reaching over 7 million shares by March 31st. Despite this, the company saw insider selling from a VP and an EVP, who divested shares totaling millions of dollars. Wall Street analysts maintain a positive outlook, with an average "Buy" rating and a consensus price target of $521.60 for Linde.

feed.title: ComplianceCow Announces Integration with ServiceNow Integrated Risk Management to Automate Continuous Control Monitoring for Enterprises
feed.summary: ComplianceCow has announced an integration with ServiceNow Integrated Risk Management (IRM) to automate continuous control monitoring for enterprises. This collaboration enables automated, continuous evidence collection, controls testing, remediation, and graph analysis for IT and cybersecurity controls. The integration aims to help GRC and SecOps teams accelerate controls, improve decision-making, and reduce strategic risk and eliminate manual busywork.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) Stock Hits All-Time High on 12-Day Winning Streak
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) stock reached a new all-time high of $270.12, achieving a 12-day winning streak not seen since 2005. The surge is attributed to strong Q1 earnings from TSMC, AMD's chip manufacturing partner, indicating high demand for AI chips, as well as an improved broader market sentiment. Analyst price targets have also been raised ahead of AMD's Q1 earnings on May 5, driven by anticipation for its collaboration with Meta and upcoming MI400 series AI chips.

feed.title: PPG highlights 2025 performance during annual meeting of shareholders
feed.summary: PPG held its annual meeting of shareholders, where CEO Tim Knavish highlighted the company's 2025 performance, including $15.9 billion in net sales, a 2% organic sales increase, and the return of $1.4 billion to shareholders. The company also focused on digital transformation, increased sustainably advantaged products to 43% of sales, and invested $18.1 million in community engagement. Shareholders re-elected directors, approved executive compensation, and ratified the accounting firm, but voted against an independent board chair policy.

feed.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP Announces Shareholder Investigation of ICU Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: ICUI)
feed.summary: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP has launched a shareholder investigation into ICU Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: ICUI) to determine if the company's directors breached their fiduciary duties through recent corporate actions. Shareholders of ICU Medical are invited to contact the firm for more information regarding their rights and options. The law firm specializes in representing shareholders affected by securities fraud and corporate misconduct.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics (NYSE: TPL) adds to Texas Pacific Land stake
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a ten percent owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp (NYSE: TPL), reported an open-market purchase of 1 share of Common Stock at $419.26 on April 15, 2026. This transaction increased its direct holdings to 3,435,497 shares. A previous Schedule 13D filing from April 13, 2026, indicated a beneficial ownership of 9,974,556 shares.

feed.title: Fracking Halliburton And The Big Bet South Of The Border
feed.summary: Halliburton (HAL) is expanding its operations into Argentina's Vaca Muerta shale formation through a partnership with YPF Sociedad Anónima (YPF), aiming to mitigate geopolitical risks and secure long-term revenue. This strategy involves deploying advanced electric fracturing (e-frac) technology to enhance efficiency and reduce environmental impact. The move positions Halliburton for resilience in a volatile energy market, with its stock price showing a favorable response.

feed.title: Arista Networks Inc Stock (ANET) Moved Up by 3.06% on Apr 16: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Arista Networks Inc (ANET) stock rose by 3.06% on April 16th, driven by strong analyst sentiment and its strategic positioning in the AI infrastructure market. Recent upgrades from firms like Zacks Research and increased price targets from multiple financial institutions, including JPMorgan, reflect growing confidence. The company's expansion of its eXtra-dense Pluggable Optics (XPO) ecosystem and robust financial performance in Q4 2025 further contribute to investor optimism regarding its future growth in AI and data center networking.

feed.title: International Paper to acquire North Pacific Paper for $360 million
feed.summary: International Paper plans to acquire North Pacific Paper Company (NORPAC) from One Rock Capital Partners for $360 million. The acquisition will add NORPAC's Longview, Washington mill, which has three paper machines and approximately 500 employees, to International Paper's system. This deal is expected to increase flexibility, reduce costs, and enhance the company's ability to supply lightweight recycled containerboard, strengthening its service for West Coast customers.

feed.title: Verizon Communications Inc Stock (VZ) Moved Up by 3.03% on Apr 16: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (VZ) stock rose 3.03% on April 16, driven by its new role as the FIFA World Cup 2026 telecommunication sponsor and favorable analyst ratings. Morgan Stanley initiated coverage with a positive outlook, and another analysis reiterated a "Strong Buy" due to robust cash flow and strategic cost-saving measures. Despite this positive movement, technical indicators suggest caution, and the company faces risks including legal challenges, significant debt, and concerns about financial reporting transparency.

feed.title: General Electric Co Stock (GE) Moved Down by 4.04% on Apr 16: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: General Electric (GE) stock fell by 4.04% on April 16, driven by investor jitters ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings report and concerns about its premium valuation. Despite a bullish outlook for GE Aerospace with strong demand and order backlogs, market participants are re-evaluating positions, leading to a correction. Technical indicators suggest neutral to oversold conditions, while fundamental analysis highlights the company's strong performance within the Industrial Goods sector.

feed.title: BlackRock Inc Stock (BLK) Moved Down by 3.05% on Apr 16: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: BlackRock Inc.'s stock (BLK) dropped by 3.05% on April 16, despite strong Q1 2026 earnings that surpassed analyst expectations. The downturn is attributed to an ongoing legal investigation by Pomerantz LLP concerning withdrawal limits on its HPS Corporate Lending Fund, recent analyst price target cuts, and broader market caution. While BlackRock reported substantial net inflows, concerns about its premium valuation, insider selling, and mixed financial sector earnings also contributed to the stock's decline.

feed.title: Teradyne Acquires TestInsight to Expand Semiconductor Test Software Capabilities
feed.summary: Teradyne Inc. has acquired TestInsight, a semiconductor software company specializing in test development and validation tools. This acquisition aims to enhance Teradyne's semiconductor test software capabilities, particularly for complex AI chips, enabling faster product launches and improved efficiency for customers. The deal highlights the increasing importance of software automation in reducing bottlenecks and accelerating production in the rapidly advancing AI semiconductor market.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY), Fortinet (FTNT) and Adeia (ADEA)
feed.summary: Analysts have provided coverage for several technology companies, including Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY), Fortinet (FTNT), and Adeia (ADEA). Jack Henry & Associates received a "Strong Buy" consensus with a 34.0% upside, Fortinet was rated "Hold" with a 10.9% upside, and Adeia earned a "Strong Buy" consensus with a 20.4% upside from current levels. These insights come from analysts like Jason Kupferberg of Wells Fargo, Ittai Kidron of Oppenheimer, and Scott Searle of Roth MKM, along with other firms.
